sections.heading: General Information Only
sections.content: The information on SafeLink India is provided for general informational purposes only. While we strive to keep information accurate and up-to-date, we make no representations or warranties of any kind about the completeness, accuracy, reliability, or availability of the information.

sections.heading: Not Official Advice
sections.content: SafeLink India is NOT an official government service. Always call 112 (National Emergency) or your local emergency number for immediate assistance. Follow instructions from official agencies: NDMA, NDRF, state disaster management authorities, police, and fire services.

sections.heading: Emergency Numbers
sections.content: Emergency phone numbers may change. Numbers listed were verified on the dates shown but may not reflect the most current information. Always try 112 first.

sections.heading: Limitation of Liability
sections.content: In no event shall SafeLink India or its contributors be liable for any loss or damage arising from the use of information on this website. In an emergency, always contact official emergency services directly.
